title: Companion tool registry
description: Registry of local coding tools a Companion skill can be installed into (Claude Code, Codex, …). The single, extensible source of truth for each tool's on-disk skill directories.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this JSON Schema for editor validation.

tools.description: Map of tool key (kebab-case, e.g. "claude-code") to its install spec.

detect.description: Paths (with ~ allowed) whose existence indicates the tool is present on this machine. Any match counts as detected.

skillsDir.description: Where this tool reads skills, by scope.

project.description: Project-relative skills directory, e.g. ".claude/skills" (joined under a repo root).

format.description: Package format the tool consumes. "skill-md" installs the package as-is; other values select a future format adapter.
